title: CEF 2026: EDPB launches coordinated enforcement action on transparency and information obligations under the GDPR
summary: Brussels, 19 March – The EDPB has launched its Coordinated Enforcement Framework (CEF) action for 2026*. Following a year-long coordinated action on the right to erasure in 2025, the CEF’s focus this year will shift to compliance with the obligations of transparency and information under the GDPR. T...
